revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Category:1954 in Japan]] <includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Category:1954 in Japan]]</includeonly> <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: create category from JA/Wikidata
revision.text:
[[Category:Categories created from enwiki title]] [[Category:Tier 2 Categories]] [[ja:Category:1954年の日本]] [[ar:Category:اليابان في 1954]] [[be:Category:1954 год у Японіі]] [[commons:Category:1954 in Japan]] [[eo:Category:1954 en Japanio]] [[es:Category:Japón en 1954]] [[fa:Category:ژاپن در ۱۹۵۴ (میلادی)]] [[fr:Category:1954 au Japon]] [[hy:Category:1954 Ճապոնիայում]] [[id:Category:Jepang dalam tahun 1954]] [[ko:Category:1954년 일본]] [[no:Category:1954 i Japan]] [[pt:Category:1954 no Japão]] [[ru:Category:1954 год в Японии]] [[sv:Category:1954 i Japan]] [[tr:Category:1954'te Japonya]] [[uk:Category:1954 у Японії]] [[ur:Category:1954ء میں جاپان]] [[vi:Category:Nhật Bản năm 1954]] [[zh_min_nan:Category:1954 nî Ji̍t-pún]] [[zh:Category:1954年日本]]
This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[Category:1954年設置の日本の市町村]].
